expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse response status='success' code=20 and confirm the NAT rule SRC-NAT-001 was staged in candidate config.
Adapter MUST record the source-translation type as 'dynamic-ip-and-port' when parsing the rule entry.
Adapter MUST emit a KSI-PAN audit event noting the NAT rule cites a security rule scope (trust-to-untrust matches the security policy direction).
Adapter MUST NOT activate the NAT rule without a subsequent commit operation.
Adapter MUST surface the rule name and xpath in the push_config_change return value for downstream drift tracking.

primary_citation.quote: NAT rules are set under rulebase/nat/rules using the same action=set mechanism as security rules.

provenance.sanitization: API key replaced with <API-KEY>. Host replaced with pa-test.example.com (synthetic). IP subnet 192.0.2.0/24 is RFC 5737 documentation range. Interface name ethernet1/1 is synthetic. No real PAN-OS device or production config captured.
